title: Mari question
wikitext:
[]: Mari question Post by Allemann » Sun Sep 06, 2009 4:44 am What's Mari's nationality?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 06, 2009 4:48 am She's named after a British warship, and seems to be associated with some European organization. So either that or Japanese.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:46 am The Home Planet of the FAR-*shot*

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 06, 2009 6:02 pm For some reason I still don't think she's a normal human or a human at all.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:18 pm Even Shinji doesn't seem to be a normal human this time around! I have no idea if they'll make Mari British. I have the impression that Asuka isn't going to be American this time around, because she's the "Ace of the Euro Air Force", so the middle name might be misleading.

[]: Post by Teague » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:36 pm She is Haruhi

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:41 pm Teague wrote: She is Haruhi

[]: Post by wonderluster » Sun Sep 06, 2009 9:56 pm Burn baby burn. She would have to be Madagascarnese where the medaclorian rate skyrockets, thus resulting in amazing Eva pilots......And The Force.

[]: Post by carla » Mon Sep 07, 2009 3:23 pm i thought she was american? or was that just fanwank? my brain is stuck on "i read somewhere that..." but i don't remember how trustworthy the source was.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 07, 2009 4:25 pm carla wrote: i thought she was american?

[]: Post by carla » Mon Sep 07, 2009 4:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Were you thinking of Maria Vincennes?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 07, 2009 5:19 pm carla wrote: i have no idea who that is.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 07, 2009 7:37 pm Let me just go ahead and blow all your minds. Mari was born at exact center of the planet. She's a cosmic fart.

[]: Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 07, 2009 9:29 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Even Shinji doesn't seem to be a normal human this time around! I have no idea if they'll make Mari British. I have the impression that Asuka isn't going to be American this time around, because she's the "Ace of the Euro Air Force", so the middle name might be misleading.

[]: Post by wonderluster » Tue Sep 08, 2009 7:10 pm Mongoosedog wrote: in the series

[]: Post by Teague » Tue Sep 08, 2009 8:47 pm wonderluster wrote: Mongoosedog wrote: in the series

[]: Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:00 pm Basically I had my mind blown because fro about 3 minutes I really believed that Mari was in the series. SHE WAS NOT. Mari was born at the center of the planet. You know that thing everybody was calling 2nd impact? Mari.
